# cx402

cx402 is the compliance layer for x402-style AI agent payments.

Base URL: https://cx402.up.railway.app

Read first:
- /health
- /supported
- /premium
- /proof/mandate
- /proof/payment-intent
- /skill.md
- /openapi.json

Core behavior:
- AI agents can attempt payments.
- cx402 checks Cleanverse A-Pass identity for payer and payee.
- cx402 enforces mandate policy: budget, max per payment, min tier, allow-list.
- cx402 verifies signed mandate and signed payment-intent proofs.
- Cleared payments settle real Cleanverse aUSDC on Monad.
- Blocked payments do not settle.
- Cleared payments produce signed receipts and Cleanverse Travel Rule report links.
